items.title: The Mobility Program Day-2 at MAHSA University
items.description:
The Mobility Program Day-2 at MAHSA University’s Faculty of Engineering, Built Environment & Information Technology was an incredible success! I had the pleasure of conducting a standalone microcredential (SAMC) course: "Gen AI for Future-ready Students and Professionals."
It was an honor to host 44 enthusiastic students and lecturers from MGR Educational & Research Institute University (Chennai, India). Their insights and eagerness to embrace AI tools made for a truly dynamic session.
MAHSA University continues to lead the way in standalone microcredential courses, not only as a provider but also as an evaluator for other institutions. We are committed to ensuring that our students—and our international partners—are equipped with the skills of tomorrow.
